news.headline: Atlanta Fed President Bostic predicts just one more rate cut this year, 25 basis points opposed to the median of 50.
news.summary: Atlanta Federal Reserve President Raphael Bostic recently shared his forecast for the year, predicting only one more interest rate cut. At an event in Atlanta, Bostic stated that he expects a 25 basis points reduction in interest rates for the remainder of the year. This contrasts with the median projection of a 50 basis points decrease, as reported by Reuters. Bostic noted, "The median projection was for an additional 50 basis points cut, on top of the 50 basis points in September. My projection is for a 25 basis points cut." This deviation in forecasts comes as a notable update from the Federal Reserve.

news.headline: Nasdaq dropped 1% as chipmaker stocks plummet, CNN's Fear & Greed index shifted to 'Greed' zone, Dow fell over 300 points.
news.summary: The market sentiment, as per the CNN Money Fear and Greed index, saw a decrease as it shifted to the “Greed” zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping by over 300 points in the trading session. ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) witnessed a significant decrease of more than 16% in its shares due to a technical glitch that led to the premature disclosure of its third-quarter earnings, originally planned for Wednesday. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) also faced a downturn with a 4.7% decline, while Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) saw a 5.2% decrease during the same session. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) encountered an 8% drop in its shares as it released its third-quarter financial results on Tuesday. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Valmet to release Interim Review for Jan - Sep 2024 on Oct 30, 2024 at 2:00pm EEST. Press release on Oct 16 at 9:30am.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Valmet Oyj announced that their Interim Review for the period of January to September 2024 will be released on October 30, 2024, around 2:00 p.m. Finnish time. This update will be made public in ESPOO, Finland, at 9:30 a.m. EEST. The report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts as it will provide insights into the company's financial performance in 2024. Stay tuned for further details about Valmet's stock exchange release.

news.headline: Documentary "UNTAPPED" featuring CEOs from GM, JPMorganChase, Walmart now on Netflix in the US - encourages inclusive talent strategies.
news.summary: Leading figures such as Mark Cuban, together with CEOs from GM, JPMorgan Chase, and Walmart, are part of the initiative known as UNTAPPED, aimed at urging Corporate America to embrace inclusive talent strategies. Recently unveiled by Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) in Pleasanton, California on Oct. 16, 2024, the documentary "UNTAPPED: Closing America's..." features prominent personalities advocating for diversity and inclusion in the workforce. This effort encourages corporations to adopt practices that promote a diverse workforce, highlighting the importance of inclusivity in the corporate world.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): USD, CAD, JPY, CHF, EUR, AUD, NZD, GBP
IQM to deliver two quantum computers for EuroHPC JU with 54 and 150 qubits. Delivery by 2026.
news.summary: In Munich, the EuroHPC Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU) has finalized a deal with IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a renowned company in the development and distribution of superconducting quantum computers. The agreement entails the delivery of two cutting-edge Radiance quantum systems. The first system, consisting of 54 qubits, is scheduled to be completed in the latter part of 2025, while the second system, boasting 150 qubits, is expected to be finished by the conclusion of 2026. These two unique systems, known for their superior qubits and top-of-the-line fidelities, will play a crucial role in advancing quantum computing technology.

news.headline: Tide and Adyen join forces to offer small businesses Tap to Pay on iPhone for in-person contactless payments.
news.summary: Tide, a prominent business financial platform in the UK, has teamed up with Adyen, a global fintech platform, to allow small businesses to accept contactless payments in person through their iPhone using the Tide iOS app. The partnership aims to provide all new and current Tide merchants with an iPhone the capability to utilize Tap to Pay on iPhone. This feature enables members to easily receive contactless payments from customers without the need for additional hardware.

news.headline: Saviynt announces Converge Global Tour 2024 event in Paris on 17th October, focusing on identity security and new platform features.
news.summary: Paris - Saviynt, a prominent company offering cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, is thrilled to introduce its Converge Global Tour 2024 event in Paris. Taking place on October 17th, this event will bring together Saviynt executives, customers, partners, and industry analysts to delve into the realm of identity security, upcoming trends, and best practices. Participants will have the opportunity to explore Saviynt's unified platform, The Identity Cloud, which includes the recently launched Saviynt Intelligence Suite.

news.headline: OutSystems honors top software innovators at 2024 Innovation Awards & Hackathon, featuring brands like Bosch, HEINEKEN, Toyota.
news.summary: OutSystems, a prominent company revolutionizing software innovation globally, revealed the victors of its 2024 Innovation Awards and the Build for the Future Hackathon in Amsterdam today. Esteemed companies, such as Bosch, HEINEKEN, and Toyota, were acknowledged for their innovation in utilizing low-code application development to transform ambitious concepts into software that propels their operations, employees, and the global community. Notable brands were recognized at the event.

news.headline: ARTHEx Biotech S.L. publishes promising research on DM1 treatment with dual targeting action, offering hope for patients.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Valencia, Spain has brought to light the effectiveness of a dual targeting action in treating myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1). This research showcases promising therapeutic potential for individuals with DM1, regardless of the severity of their condition. ARTHEx Biotech S.L., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, spearheaded this study, which was revealed on October 16, 2024. This development brings hope for individuals suffering from DM1 and underlines the importance of dual targeting approaches in medical treatment.

news.headline: iCIMS research at UNLEASH World found 99% of UK recruiters use AI, saving hours weekly. AI reshaping recruitment.
news.summary: The iCIMS UK 2024 Talent Experience Report was recently revealed, shedding light on the impact of AI on the experiences of candidates and recruiters. Released during UNLEASH World on October 16, 2024, this second annual report highlighted that an overwhelming 99% of recruiters in the United Kingdom are influenced by AI in their roles. The study provides valuable insights into the changing dynamics of talent acquisition and the growing reliance on technological advancements in the recruitment process.

news.headline: Talent Lifecycle Management company Cappfinity appoints Celine Floyd as Chief Skills Officer, highlighting its skills proposition.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, the Talent Lifecycle Management company Cappfinity appointed Celine Floyd as its Chief Skills Officer. This new role highlights Cappfinity's strong skills offerings and its leadership in assisting individuals in their skills development journey.

news.headline: Lifesum suggests 5 ways for employers to invest in gut health to save $140 billion in healthcare costs due to GI disorders in 70 million Americans.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 16, 2024, it was reported that around 70 million individuals in America are impacted by gastrointestinal (GI) disorders, such as Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS). These conditions contribute to a staggering $140 billion in healthcare expenses each year, surpassing costs related to heart disease and mental health issues.

news.headline: Nebius introduces new NVIDIA cloud platform tailored for AI, made by 400 engineers, promising to accelerate innovation.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on October 16, 2024, Nebius, a prominent AI infrastructure firm, revealed the introduction of the inaugural cloud computing platform tailored exclusively for the AI era. The platform was meticulously developed by approximately 400 cloud engineers and incorporates extensive AI knowledge.

news.headline: Seeq and AVEVA partner to enhance industrial analytics and AI services for organizations; announced on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Today, on October 16, 2024, Seeq, a renowned company specializing in industrial analytics, AI, and enterprise monitoring, revealed a new collaboration aimed at enhancing data sharing and operational results for industrial organizations. This partnership will leverage Seeq Industrial Analytics and AI Suite as well as CONNECT to achieve these objectives.

news.headline: XYRA announced FDA guidance for using wearable AF monitoring devices in clinical trials for budiodarone approval, enhancing routine practice globally.
news.summary: The utilization of wearable atrial fibrillation (AF) monitoring devices is widespread in regular medical practice globally. The FDA has approved the use of AF monitoring gadgets in clinical trials for buiodarone clearance. Additionally, the FDA has provided instructions on the necessary procedures for integrating wearable AF monitoring devices.

news.headline: eBay's Circular Fashion Fund expands globally, investing $1.2 million by 2025 with partners like BFC and CFDA.
news.summary: Online marketplace eBay has announced a collaboration with the British Fashion Council, Council of Fashion Designers of America, Fashion Council Germany, and Australian Fashion Council. This partnership aims to expand eBay's influence worldwide in the fashion industry. The initiative, unveiled in San Jose, California on October 16, 2024, signifies eBay's commitment to becoming a key player in the fashion sector. eBay's reputation as a top spot for both new and second-hand fashion items will be further solidified by this strategic alliance with prominent fashion councils.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority unveils RMB sovereign bond tender results for 2-year bonds, amid high interest on 10/16/2024.
news.summary: Results from the recent RMB sovereign bond tender hosted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority on October 16, 2024, have been unveiled, illustrating noteworthy enthusiasm for its 2-year bonds.

news.headline: Kioxia announces PCIe 5.0 NVMe EDSFF E1.S SSDs with sequential read performance up to 12,500 MB/s for cloud and hyperscale.
news.summary: In Tokyo, there was a correction to a release dated October 15, 2024, regarding the performance of the KIOXIA XD8 Series PCIe 5.0 NVMe EDSFF E1.S SSDs. The corrected information states that the sequential read performance is up to 12,500 megabytes per second, marking a 73% improvement over the previous generation. This update is significant for cloud and hyperscale environments.

news.headline: Stocks to watch include Morgan Stanley (MS) earnings expecting $1.58/share on $14.41B revenue. JB Hunt (JBHT) outperformed in Q3.
news.summary: Stock futures in the U.S. are trading with a mixed outlook this Wednesday morning. Investors are likely to focus on certain stocks today:Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $1.58 per share on revenue of $14.41 billion before the market opens. In after-hours trading, the company's shares rose by 0.2% to reach $112.49.J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) posted stronger-than-anticipated financial results for the third quarter. Further details on this can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FPT Software in Vietnam, Germany, and France gets ISO 45001 certification for occupational health and safety.
news.summary: FPT Software, a global IT industry frontrunner, has acquired ISO 45001 certification, the renowned standard for workplace health and safety. This certification is valid for all twelve facilities of FPT Software located in Vietnam, Germany, and France. ISO 45001:2018, formulated and managed by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO), guarantees that organizations implement a systematic approach to mitigating health and safety hazards in the workplace, safeguarding employees from potential dangers.

news.headline: UK rate futures point to 45 bps of BoE rate cuts by the year's end vs 37 bps before weaker than expected UK inflation data.
Li Peng spoke at Huawei GITEX 2024 in Dubai, UAE on Oct. 14 about thriving in the Intelligent Era.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 14, Li Peng, Corporate Senior Vice President and President of ICT Sales & Service at Huawei, delivered a keynote speech at Huawei GITEX 2024. Titled 'Thriving Together in the Intelligent Era,' Peng highlighted the evolution of the digital economy into an intelligent era. The event drew attention from industry experts and technology enthusiasts. The speech addressed the transformative power of technology in today's landscape, emphasizing collaboration and innovation. The event attracted a significant audience, including key stakeholders and business professionals, showcasing the growing interest in advancing technologies.

news.headline: NAVEE partners with Target to launch S40 and V40i electric scooters globally, marking a significant milestone.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, NAVEE revealed a major achievement in its worldwide expansion efforts by teaming up with popular North American merchant Target to introduce the much-awaited NAVEE S40 and V40i electric scooters in its outlets. This collaboration marks an important step in NAVEE's growth, offering customers the opportunity to purchase these new electric scooters at Target stores.

news.headline: LRQA hosts Sustainability Leadership Series 2024 in Dubai, highlighting global move towards sustainability in business practices.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Dubai, the global assurance partner LRQA organized a Sustainability Leadership Series event to address the pressing issue of sustainability across industries. This initiative is part of the worldwide push towards sustainability, with LRQA taking a prominent role in leading discussions. The event in Dubai saw the gathering of stakeholders from various sectors to discuss strategies and solutions. This event highlights LRQA's commitment to driving sustainability practices globally and encouraging collaboration among key players. Keeping in line with the growing focus on sustainable practices, this event emphasized the importance of such initiatives in achieving environmental goals.

news.headline: Japan's Rengo eyes at least 5% of wage hikes next year - NHK
Elizabeth Warren accuses John Deaton of being funded 90% by crypto lobby, sparking debate in Senate hopefuls.
news.summary: In the first debate between Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren and her Republican challenger John Deaton, the topic of cryptocurrencies became a battleground. Co-sponsored by WBZ News and The Boston Globe, the debate showcased the starkly contrasting views of the two politicians on this asset class.During the debate, Warren accused Deaton of being heavily funded by the cryptocurrency lobby to secure the Massachusetts Senate seat. Warren, seeking a third term, claimed that Deaton receives 90% of his campaign funding from the crypto industry, insinuating potential conflicts of interest.This development underscores the heated exchanges and discord between the two contenders on the issue of cryptocurrencies. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GITEX DIGI_HEALTH 5.0 Dubai hosts medical innovators discussing AI opportunities in neurology & patient monitoring.
news.summary: A gathering of distinguished professionals and visionaries from top medical labs, hospitals, healthcare institutions, research centers, and academia took place in Dubai. The event centered around exploring AI prospects, with a focus on neurology and remote patient monitoring. Key topics included the intersection of technology...

news.headline: Aavo Kokk resigns as a member of PRFoods Group's Supervisory Board effective October 21, 2024; will also step down as Audit Committee Chairman.
news.summary: PRFoods has disclosed that Aavo Kokk will be stepping down from his role as a member of the Supervisory Board, effective October 21, 2024. Additionally, Kokk will resign from his position as Chairman of the Audit Committee.

news.headline: Bitcoin's dominance reaches 60%, highest in 3.5 years, leaving altcoins behind with minimal gains in the past day.
news.summary: The dominance of Bitcoin in the market approached 60%, reaching its peak level since April 2021, as altcoins experienced moderate growth over the past 24 hours.

news.headline: SKF to release Q3 results on Oct 30 at 07:00 (CET). Webcast in English at 08:00 (CET) for investors, analysts, and media.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, SKF is set to release its third quarter results of 2024 on October 30th around 07:00 (CET). A webcast will follow at 08:00 (CET) in English for investors, analysts, and media personnel. Access to the webcast can be obtained by logging in at least 10 minutes before its commencement.

news.headline: CLO Virtual Fashion held its User Summit with 80+ attendees; leading provider of digital 3D garment solutions.
news.summary: On September 12, 2024, in Munich, CLO Virtual Fashion, the top company in digital 3D garment solutions, organized its Enterprise User Summit. The event drew in over 80 attendees from various fashion brands and vendors.

news.headline: Megaport expands to 14 data centers in Europe and strengthens operations with partnerships, driving growth.
news.summary: Megaport, a company based in Brisbane, Australia, is experiencing significant growth in Europe through the establishment of new Points of Presence and partnerships with key entities. This expansion includes collaborations with Portus Data Centers, NorthC Data Centers, and Sipartech. These developments are contributing to Megaport's increased presence and operations in the region, marking a substantial stride in their expansion efforts.

news.headline: Wiley to showcase AI innovations at Frankfurt Book Fair, focusing on scholarly publishing insights.
news.summary: This week in Frankfurt, Germany, Wiley will present important information on artificial intelligence (AI) in scholarly publishing at the Frankfurt Book Fair.

news.headline: Warren's political rival Deaton pledges to support crypto if elected to Senate. Keaton criticizes Warren's focus on inflation.
news.summary: John Keaton expressed his belief that Senator Warren should address inflation with the same intensity she applies when discussing cryptocurrency during the debate.

Cornish Metals secures £7M credit facility from Vision Blue Resources, avoiding dilution.
news.summary: Cornish Metals has recently secured a non-dilutive credit facility of £7 million with Vision Blue Resources Limited.

news.headline: SONIRE from Tokyo announces FDA breakthrough device status for HIFU therapy system Suizenji.
news.summary: Tokyo-based company SONIRE Therapeutics Inc. has recently revealed that their advanced HIFU (High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound) therapy system, known as Suizenji, has received a special designation. The company, located in Tokyo, Japan, made this announcement on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Danske Bank adopts Broadridge's proxy voting technology for better investor services worldwide. Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: Danske Bank, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, has recently partnered with Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR) to improve their client services on a global scale. By incorporating Broadridge's advanced global proxy voting technology, the bank aims to enhance their operations. This move signifies Danske Bank's commitment to providing top-notch services to its clients.

news.headline: SK chemicals launches 'ECOTRIA CLARO 300' - large-capacity recyclable containers for 2+ liters, targeting 30,000 tons sales in EBM market by Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: SK chemicals in South Korea is working to enhance production capabilities for large-capacity containers, with a focus on bottles of 2 liters or more. The company is pursuing a significant share of the market, aiming for sales reaching 30,000 tons in the EBM market. This initiative not only boosts production efficiency but also enhances transparency and recyclability of the containers.
